meaning: vt.用计算机处理,使计算机化
examples: We want to computerize the current manual system we have.
For its part, Microsoft is betting that cable is the cheapest way to computerize 100 million homes, beating out telephone lines with modems.
And it has an edge: it embraced new technology early on, being one of the first to computerize customs clearance and other port operations.
They could even computerize that part of it.
